case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. OLINDA C. AGUILAR

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-28-2010 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-06-2011 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AGUILAR, OLINDA C. $1,900.20 PRINCIPAL, $377.03 INTEREST, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,357.23, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
